word: H64 - אָבֵל כְּרָמִים - ʼÂbêl Kᵉrâmîym - aw-bale' ker-aw-meem' - Plain of the vineyards

sections.paragraph:
Original: אבל כּרמים

Transliteration: 'âbêl kerâmı̂ym

Phonetic: aw-bale' ker-aw-meem'

BDB Definition:

Abel Keramim = "meadow of the vineyards"
  1. a place in Ammon

Origin: from H58 and the plural of H3754

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
Cognate: H58, H59, H62, H63, H65, H66, H67
